messages.about.basedOn: Based on "Magium" by Cristian Mihailescu / Chris Michael Wilson.
messages.about.changes: Changes: French translation, UI adaptation, technical restructuring, additional interface features.
messages.about.license: Original story/data licensed under Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 International (CC BY 4.0).
messages.about.title: About
messages.about.translation: French translation and adaptation by Foobar, 2026.
messages.about.unofficial: This is an unofficial adaptation and is not endorsed by the original author's estate or the Magium community maintainers.
messages.abilities.empty: Your abilities will appear here after Barry checks the stat device.
messages.abilities.help: Use + to prepare a point allocation. Use - to cancel a prepared point. Once confirmed, points are spent and cannot be removed from this panel.
messages.abilities.title: Abilities
messages.achievements.title: Achievements
messages.contribution.creditHelp: Pseudonyms can be moderated before publication if they are illegal, abusive, explicit, impersonating, or otherwise unsuitable.
messages.contribution.creditRequested: Credit this pseudonym if the contribution is retained
messages.contribution.errorEmail: Enter an email address or turn off notifications.
messages.contribution.errorParagraphBreak: Send one paragraph at a time. Remove the blank line or open another paragraph correction.
messages.contribution.errorPseudonym: Enter a pseudonym or turn off credits.
messages.contribution.errorUnavailable: Translation contributions are not configured on this build.
messages.contribution.errorUnchanged: Change the text before sending a proposal.
messages.contribution.notifyHelp: The first email confirmation is saved in this browser for one year. The email is used only for follow-up and is deleted after rejection or publication.
messages.contribution.notifyRequested: Notify me by email about this proposal
messages.contribution.privacy: You can contribute anonymously. Technical IDs are sent to route the proposal, but they are not shown here. Bot protection runs before submission.
messages.contribution.proposeChoice: Propose a correction for this choice
messages.contribution.proposeParagraph: Propose a correction for this paragraph
messages.contribution.rememberHelp: Stored locally in this browser only. You can erase it at any time.
messages.contribution.rememberProfile: Remember pseudonym and email on this device
messages.contribution.statusEmailConfirmationSent: Proposal sent. A confirmation email has just been sent.
messages.contribution.statusEmailConfirmed: Proposal sent. You will receive an email when it has been reviewed.
messages.contribution.statusEmailConsentNotStored: Email confirmed. Follow-up is enabled for this proposal, but this browser cannot remember the confirmation for your next contributions.
messages.contribution.statusEmailConsentStored: Email confirmed. Follow-up is enabled for this proposal, and this browser will remember the confirmation for your next contributions.
messages.contribution.statusProfileCleared: Contribution details were erased from this device.
messages.contribution.statusSent: Proposal sent. Thank you for the correction.
messages.contribution.title: Propose a correction
messages.debug.title: Debug
messages.errors.debugBoolean: Debug boolean values must be true or false
messages.errors.debugNumber: Debug numeric values must be finite numbers
messages.errors.choiceUnavailable: Choice is not available from the current state
messages.errors.decompressionUnsupported: This browser does not support runtime content decompression
messages.errors.saveContentVersion: This save belongs to another content version
messages.errors.saveExportPasswordRequired: Choose an export password before downloading the save.
messages.errors.saveLocalOnly: This file was not protected for transfer. Export the save again with a password.
messages.errors.savePasswordOrCorrupt: Wrong password or damaged save file
messages.errors.savePasswordRequired: Enter the export password for this save.
messages.errors.saveTamper: This save file does not match a playable playthrough
messages.errors.statUnavailable: This stat is not available for allocation
messages.saves.autosaveCopy: Your current playthrough is saved after every choice and stat allocation.
messages.saves.copy: The game saves automatically after every choice. Use local saves to keep several playthroughs, and export only when you want a file to keep or move elsewhere.
messages.saves.deleteConfirmCopy: This only removes the local save. Your automatic save stays available.
messages.saves.debugLocalOnly: This save was changed with Debug and can only stay in local saves.
messages.saves.exportHelp: Choose a password to protect this file. You will need it to import the save elsewhere.
messages.saves.importHelp: Use the password chosen when the save was exported.
messages.saves.localCopy: Create a local save before an important choice, then load or rename it later.
messages.saves.title: Saves
messages.saves.transferCopy: Export or import a save file. A password is only needed for these file actions.
messages.settings.copy: These choices only affect reading comfort. The story and your progress stay the same.
messages.settings.highContrastHelp: Make text and controls stand out more strongly.
messages.settings.illustrationsHelp: Show moment illustrations after the matching scene when they are available.
messages.settings.textSizeHelp: Adjust the story text for longer reading sessions.
messages.settings.translationContributionsHelp: Show pencil icons on paragraphs and choices to propose a correction.
messages.settings.title: Settings
